65960479.transcript: You needn't worry about me, lass! I'm a slippery fella!

jp.text: 心配無用！思いっきり放つがよい！

jp.text: チーチチチチ、追撃とはこうやるもんじゃ！

79386933.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600

90963665.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
90963665.transcript: Ugh! Gettin' hard to keep up with you kids!

94141350.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400

jp.literal: It was only because of everyone's cooperation that we were able to break through.

180540933.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
180540933.transcript: Heh heh! Ain't nothing compared to you angels!

jp.text: チッ、チッ、チッ。天使の見技かて見事なもんじゃて。
jp.literal: Hehehe! The Angel's Mirage is quite the sight!

jp.text: 承知、捕まつる！

182437193.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
182437193.transcript: Mmm, lot o' juice hidin' in that gun o' yours!

jp.text: そこしれぬ力を秘めた銃じゃのう！
jp.literal: A shrine that hides the power of the abyss, huh?

201010264.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
201010264.transcript: Hmm. Maybe a little socializing would do you some good.

jp.text: うーん、もうちょっとばかし愛想よくはできんもんかぬー
jp.literal: Hmph. Can't you do anything but babble?

201695274.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
201695274.transcript: Hoo-hoo-wee! There are times you do, miss!

jp.text: ホオー！見事なもんじゃのう！

215539455.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
215539455.transcript: Key is to do somethin' and never stop! Oh, and stretchin'!

jp.text: キッヒッヒッヒッヒ！他者の討ちに頑張ったかんとな！

jp.text: ハァハァ、光栄にござるわい！

253733498.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
253733498.transcript: Amazing you youngins never get old!

jp.text: そいつは最高の褒め言葉じゃな！

259185411.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
259185411.transcript: Hehehe, sorry if I spooked ya!

278724374.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
278724374.transcript: Thank me after we've all made it safely back home!

290911067.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
290911067.transcript: Hm. Your well of power runs deep. But how deep?

jp.text: ベアトリクス！

325312054.transcript: The body may weaken with age, but the mind and hand just keep getting more refined!

351535613.transcript: To be in the throes of youth! Wish I still had an appetite like you!

364833488.transcript: Seems our foes are none too impressed, though!

380163796.transcript: Not gonna let this old fart run laps 'round ya, are ya?

457174564.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700

475109559.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
475109559.transcript: Kehehe! Raining ghosts and dogs it was!

jp.literal: Hehehehe, this is lively, isn't it!

493154023.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
493154023.transcript: Hehe, and the forecast just keeps lookin' better and better!

495650892.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400

jp.text: はぁはぁ…こりゃ将来有望じゃな
jp.literal: Hah hah! This is quite the future prospect!

504632949.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
504632949.transcript: Ooh! Go on and make me blush, why don't ya!

508162732.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
508162732.transcript: Heh heh! You'll never miss a beat, do ya lass?

524468878.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500

528883114.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
528883114.transcript: The youths of today look to us to mold them into leaders!

jp.text: 若い衆を導くのも、わしらの役目じゃの
jp.literal: It's our duty to guide the young ones, isn't it?

529256687.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
529256687.transcript: Heh heh! Pair of us sure gave 'em what for, eh, sunny?

562089231.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
562089231.transcript: Aye, and we'll drag the rest to the darkest depths!

624636234.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600

決めどころじゃな！

681112659.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400

700912029.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
700912029.transcript: Hohoho! You really put the art in martial artist, missy!

714309264.transcript: You ain't gettin' winded, are ya, sonny?

723376855.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300

726717170.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
726717170.transcript: Hey! I'm as shocked as you are!

821576140.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600

838968565.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
838968565.transcript: Hehehe! And there's more where that came from!

844213002.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
844213002.transcript: Takes patience, focus, and one heck of a hot foot!

850605111.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600

863457042.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500

907070522.transcript: We sure sang a tune with that duet!

908289312.transcript: Like two spring chickens in lockstep!
